2.desc_resolved: Your basic attack inflicts permanent Rot.

NeverFull.name: PASSIVE_NEVERFULL_NAME
NeverFull.desc_resolved:
You can heal over your max HP.
Excess HP is lost between battles.

2.desc_resolved:
You can heal over your max HP.
Excess HP is lost between battles.
Gain +1 [img:str] for every 5 HP you have over max HP.

MainCourse.name: PASSIVE_MAINCOURSE_NAME
MainCourse.desc_resolved: Food and scrap pickups you spawn are bigger.

2.desc_resolved: Food and scrap pickups you spawn are max size.
When you eat food, gain +1 [img:str] and +1 to a random stat.

Masochist.name: PASSIVE_MASOCHIST_NAME
Masochist.desc_resolved: When you take damage, gain +1 [img:str], [img:con], or [img:spd] at random.

2.desc_resolved: When you take damage, you get +1 [img:str], [img:con], and [img:spd].

Glutton.name: PASSIVE_GLUTTON_NAME
Glutton.desc_resolved: When a food pickup spawns within 2 tiles of you, move to it.

2.desc_resolved: When a food pickup spawns within 2 tiles of you, move to it with trample.

Hooked.name: PASSIVE_HOOKED_NAME
Hooked.desc_resolved: You can use your hook 2 additional times on your turn.

2.desc_resolved:
You can use your hook 2 additional times on your turn.
Your hook deals +1 damage and has Cleave.

Stompy.name: PASSIVE_STOMPY_NAME
Stompy.desc_resolved:
You have Trample.
Trample damage you deal has Cleave.

2.desc_resolved:
You have Trample and +2 Bonus Moves.
Trample damage you deal has Cleave.

Barbed.name: PASSIVE_BARBED_NAME
Barbed.desc_resolved: Your hook deals +1 damage and inflicts Bleed.

2.desc_resolved: Your hook deals +5 damage and inflicts Bleed.

GrapplingHook.name: PASSIVE_GRAPPLINGHOOK_NAME
GrapplingHook.desc_resolved: Your hook pulls you toward knockback-immune objects.

2.desc_resolved: Your hook pulls you toward knockback-immune objects. Refresh your movement action when you use your hook.

PainGain.name: PASSIVE_PAINGAIN_NAME
PainGain.desc_resolved: When you take damage, gain +2 Temp Damage.

2.desc_resolved: When you take damage, gain +1 Damage and +1 Temp Damage.

WideSwing.name: PASSIVE_WIDESWING_NAME
WideSwing.desc_resolved: Your basic attack is a 3x3 tile spin attack with Cleave.

2.desc_resolved: Your basic attack is a 3x3 tile double spin attack with Cleave.

Confrontational.name: PASSIVE_CONFRONTATIONAL_NAME
Confrontational.desc_resolved: When you take damage, trample one tile towards the source of damage.

2.desc_resolved: When you take damage, trample all the way to the source of damage.

HeaveHook.name: PASSIVE_HEAVEHOOK_NAME
HeaveHook.desc_resolved:
Your hook can target tiles.
Units pulled by your hook gain trample while being hooked.

2.desc_resolved:
Your hook can target tiles.
Units pulled by your hook gain trample while being hooked, this trample damage is doubled.

Harpooner.name: PASSIVE_HARPOONER_NAME
Harpooner.desc_resolved: When an enemy moves in range, hook it.

2.desc_resolved: When an enemy moves in range, hook it. Your hook deals +2 Damage.

LordOfTheFlies.name: PASSIVE_LORDOFTHEFLIES_NAME
LordOfTheFlies.desc_resolved:
All flies are Charmed and get +1 Damage.
Whenever you inflict Rot, you inflict +1 Rot.

2.desc_resolved:
All flies are Charmed and get +4 Damage.
Whenever you inflict Rot, you inflict +1 Rot.

Schadenfreude.name: PASSIVE_SCHADENFREUDE_NAME
Schadenfreude.desc_resolved: Your [img:str] and [img:con] are increased by 2 for each disorder your party has.

2.desc_resolved: All of your stats are increased by 2 for each disorder your party has.

Gurgitator.name: PASSIVE_GURGITATOR_NAME
Gurgitator.desc_resolved: Whenever you heal over your max HP, gain +1 [img:str].

2.desc_resolved: Whenever you heal over your max HP, gain +1 [img:str] and +1 Weapon Damage.

LooseMeat.name: PASSIVE_LOOSEMEAT_NAME
LooseMeat.desc_resolved: When you take damage, spawn a food pickup.

2.desc_resolved: When you take damage or move, spawn a food pickup.

Hack.name: PASSIVE_HACK_NAME
Hack.desc_resolved:
Your basic attack is always critical against enemies with [img:shield].
Your basic attack's critical hits remove buffs from units.

2.desc_resolved:
Your basic attack is always critical against enemies with [img:shield].
Your basic attack's critical hits remove buffs from units.
Your critical hits deal +100% damage.

BowlingBall.name: PASSIVE_BOWLINGBALL_NAME
BowlingBall.desc_resolved: Adjacent and diagonal allied cats get the bonus ability Bowl.

2.desc_resolved: Adjacent and diagonal allied cats get the bonus ability Bowl+.

Testy.name: PASSIVE_TESTY_NAME
Testy.desc_resolved: When you take damage, gain +1 movement range until the end of your turn.

2.desc_resolved: When you take damage, gain +1 movement range.

Indigestion.name: PASSIVE_INDIGESTION_NAME
Indigestion.desc_resolved: Whenever you heal over your max HP, fart and inflict Poison 3 on adjacent units.

2.desc_resolved: Whenever you heal over your max HP, fart and inflict Poison 3 and Burn 3 on adjacent units.

Incubator.name: PASSIVE_INCUBATOR_NAME
Incubator.desc_resolved: Whenever you heal over your max HP, spawn a rot fly.

2.desc_resolved: Whenever you heal over your max HP, spawn a rot fly with HP and damage equal to the excess healing.

DukeOfFlies.name: PASSIVE_DUKEOFFLIES_NAME
DukeOfFlies.desc_resolved:
At the end of the battle, all food pickups become allied flies.
Allied flies stay with you between battles.

2.desc_resolved:
At the end of the battle, all food pickups become allied flies.
Allied flies stay with you between battles.
Your basic attack spawns flies.
